tool.name: URL Context
tool.description: Enables the model to fetch, read, and analyze content from URLs mentioned in the conversation.

urls.description: List of URLs to explicitly fetch context from (optional, model usually detects automatically)

ai.systemPromptSection:
### URL Context
Automatically fetch and read content from URLs.

**Capabilities:**
- Read web pages, PDFs, and articles
- Summarize and analyze external content

**Usage:**
Enabled via tool configuration. The model will automatically access URLs provided in the user prompt.
